title: Banners Everywhere
description: Place banners in cool new ways
body:
![Banners Everywhere](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/459bcd63fed24beef59d72a432e4957e1b93604d.png)

### Features
- Attach Banners horizontally/sideways onto the side of a Block
- Attach Banners to the side of a Block, letting them hang down (_v1.1.0 and later_)
- Hang Banners down from the Ceiling (Bottom of a Block)

### Instructions
- Sideways Banner: **shift/sneak** and **right-click** the side of the block in the **middle** you want to attach the banner to
- Side Banner: **right-click** the side of the block in the **upper/bottom part** you want to attach the banner to (_v1.1.0 and later_)
- Hanging Banner:  **right-click** the **bottom** of the block you want to hang it from

![Hanging Banners Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2450fb6e58487027711a0b7563808191ab7a54cd.png)
![Sideways Banner Preview (Flag)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3097bfc09ee560769173eb4ec7693bea5362a68_0.webp)
![Sideways Banner Preview (Arrow)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2510134150f3f26025b0006d738f849f5d5a031.png)
![Side Banner Preview (Hanging on the side of the Block)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f9fa65105e8a92c28768a0e86c75a7d853715eb.png)
